theme_archetype.description: A refined, professional medical dashboard focused on operational clarity. Blends the warmth and trust of Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) with the functional precision of Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast). Avoids childish or generic SaaS looks.

primary.description: Deep Trust Blue. Used for primary CTAs and sidebar active states.

accent.description: Sky Blue. Used for subtle highlights and progress indicators.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Control Room Grid (Dense, functional, optimized for data)

structure.desktop: Sidebar (w-64, sticky, h-screen) + Main Content Area
structure.mobile: Top Header (sticky, z-50) + Main Content Area + Bottom Navigation (sticky, bottom-0, z-50)

Button.style: Solid colors, no gradients. Use ring on focus.

Card.style: Flat background (bg-white), 1px subtle border (border-slate-200), minimal shadow (shadow-sm). Used for KPI metrics and dashboard panels.

Table.style: Clean rows, bottom border only on cells (border-slate-100). Hover state on rows (hover:bg-slate-50).

Badge.style: Soft backgrounds with dark text for status. No outlines.

interactions.hover: Subtle background color shifts and translation (-translate-y-[1px] for cards)

iconography.style: Clean, line-based, 2px stroke width. Consistent sizing (18px for buttons, 24px for sidebar, 20px for cards).

images.description: Contemporary dental office interior with high-tech equipment and stylish design. Use as a split-screen background for the login/register page.
Professional male dentist in a white coat. Used as default avatar for the main doctor role.
Happy patient holding a mirror. Used for placeholder patient profiles in the CRM section.

features_spec.dashboard_today: Prioritize 'Cose da fare oggi' (Today's Tasks) prominently. Use a vertical list or bento grid for upcoming appointments, pending quotes, and late payments.
features_spec.kpi_cards: Top row of the dashboard. Show key metrics: Ricavi (Revenue), Preventivi Accettati (Quotes accepted), No-Show Rate, Appuntamenti Oggi.
features_spec.navigation: Desktop: Sidebar with Logo, Links (Dashboard, Appuntamenti, Preventivi, Pazienti, Impostazioni), User Profile at bottom. Mobile: Bottom Navigation for main links, Header for Page Title & Notifications.
features_spec.pwa_ready: Ensure touch targets are large enough (min 44px) for mobile. Use responsive tables or card-based lists for patient data on small screens.

testing.data_testid_convention: kebab-case, role-based. e.g., data-testid='sidebar-dashboard-link', data-testid='kpi-revenue-card', data-testid='today-tasks-list'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and setup Shadcn UI completely. Do not use plain HTML for interactive components.
Ensure the application is mobile-first. The bottom navigation bar on mobile is crucial for usability.
Implement the 'Control Room' grid layout for the dashboard. It needs to be dense but highly readable.
Use Manrope for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text. Verify they are imported correctly from Google Fonts.
Apply the designated color palette in tailwind.config.js.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive and structural elements.
Use the provided image URLs for auth background and placeholders. Do NOT use fake placeholder image services.
